title: strychnos penninervis
intro: Strychnos penninervis, also known as the Yellow Stembark tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos penninervis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
